content: Hi, I'm Riley and I'm a Journalist covering technology. I just moved to Berlin, Germany and I'm still getting used to the city.
Welcome to Berlin, Riley! It's an incredible city. What do you think of it so far?
I love it! The food, the culture, the people... everything is just so great. I'm actually in the process of renovating my new house here and it's been a fun project.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Renovating a house can be a big project, but it's great that you're enjoying it. What made you decide to move to Berlin?
I actually got a job offer from a tech company here and I actually really love the city, so it was a no-brainer for me. I'm excited to explore more of the city and try out all the local foods.
That's great! Berlin is a hub for tech and innovation. Have you tried any of the local specialties like currywurst or schnitzel?

Yes, I have! I actually really love trying out new foods and drinks, and I've been trying to learn more about the local culture here. I've also been trying to learn more about mechanical keyboards, which is a hobby of mine.
That's really cool! I wouldn't have guessed that you're into mechanical keyboards. Do you have a favorite type of switch or keyboard?
Yeah, I'm actually a big fan of Cherry MX switches and I love my Anne Pro 2 keyboard. I'm also really into birdwatching and I love going on hikes and spotting new species.
That sounds like a lot of fun! I'm sure you'll have a great time exploring the city and trying out new foods and drinks. It was great chatting with you about your move to Berlin and your hobbies.
Thanks, I will! It was great talking to you too. I'm looking forward to my next adventure and trying out some new foods and drinks.
